name: Corn Squash Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups butternut squash, skin and seeds removed
1 medium red bell pepper, seeded and chopped
1 zucchini, sliced into rounds about 6 inches long
2 cups whole kernel corn, frozen and thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute squash in butter for 3 minutes in a saucepan.
2. Add bell pepper, zucchini, corn, and tomatoes with all seasonings. Continue sauteing for 2 to 3 more minutes.
3. Transfer the mixture to a deep oiled casserole dish and cover with grated cheese.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 to 30 minutes.
Makes 3 main dish servings or 6 side dishes.
